findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `Generator.lean:37:theorem tendsto_average_Ioc_zero_of_continuousOn_Ici`; its only uses in this PR are internal proofs of orbit/resolvent averages.
findings.fix: Make it `private`, or move it to an appropriately named general analysis file only if it is intended as reusable public API.
findings.issue: `tendsto_average_Ioc_zero_of_continuousOn_Ici` is a generic interval-integral averaging lemma exposed from the semigroup module, not part of the C₀-semigroup interface.

findings.evidence: `Basic.lean:124:theorem at_zero (S : StronglyContinuousSemigroup X) : S.realOperator 0 = ContinuousLinearMap.id ℝ X`; only the pointwise `realOperatorZeroApply` at line 203 is currently `@[simp]`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `at_zero` so `simp` can reduce `S.realOperator 0` to `ContinuousLinearMap.id ℝ X` in operator-valued goals.
findings.issue: `StronglyContinuousSemigroup.at_zero` is the operator-level normal form for `S.realOperator 0`, but it is not marked `@[simp]`.

summary: The semigroup/generator/resolvent surface is mostly characteristic, but the public API still leaks one generic proof helper and misses a normal-form simp annotation for the real-time zero operator.
